apis.name: PokeAPI
apis.query: { pokemon_v2_pokemon(limit: 50) { id name base_experience height weight pokemon_v2_pokemontypes { pokemon_v2_type { name } } pokemon_v2_pokemonabilities { pokemon_v2_ability { name } } pokemon_v2_pokemonstats { base_stat pokemon_v2_stat { name } } } }

apis.name: Rick & Morty
apis.query: { characters(page: 1) { results { id name status species type gender image origin { name } location { name } episode { id } } } }

apis.name: AniList (Trending)
apis.query: { Page(page: 1, perPage: 50) { media(sort: TRENDING_DESC, type: ANIME) { id title { english native } episodes status genres averageScore popularity } } }

apis.name: Countries
apis.query: { countries { code name capital currency phone } }
